infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Liftpictures to use your camera so you can take and upload ride photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Liftpictures to access your photos so you can upload and manage ride photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow Liftpictures to save edited photos to your photo library.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Liftpictures to access your photos so you can set a profile image.
Allow Liftpictures to access your photos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Liftpictures to save photos to your gallery.
